database.sql: SELECT IndexId, ConfigType, ConfigVersion, Address, Port, Id, AlterId, Security, Network, Remarks, HeaderType, RequestHost, Path, StreamSecurity, AllowInsecure, Subid, IsSub, Flow, Sni, Alpn, CoreType, PreSocksPort, Fingerprint, DisplayLog, PublicKey, ShortId, SpiderX, Extra, Ports, Mldsa65Verify, MuxEnabled, Cert FROM ProfileItem WHERE Subid in ('5544178410297751350','5126987642659995691')  AND ConfigType IN ('1', '3', '5', '6') and indexid in (select indexid from ProfileExItem where message not like '%OK%');
